title: Development of the Unified Binod Calendar Through Temporal Synchronization Theory
institution: Binodian Institute for Astronomical and Space Research
abstract: This paper presents the theoretical foundation and empirical validation of the Unified Binod Calendar, derived from Temporal Synchronization Theory, and formalizes the Active Temporal Flow policy governing civil time advancement.
citation: Kade, S., Rolex, A. (2026). Development of the Unified Binod Calendar Through Temporal Synchronization Theory. BIASR Journal, 1(1). https://doi.org/10.5000/biasr.2026.001

title: Orbital Stability of the Binod Solar System
institution: Binodian Institute for Astronomical and Space Research
abstract: A long-baseline numerical stability analysis of the Binod system's planetary orbits, examining resonance conditions and perturbation tolerances over multi-year integration windows.
citation: Ferra, M., Kade, S. (2026). Orbital Stability of the Binod Solar System. BIASR Journal, 1(1). https://doi.org/10.5000/biasr.2026.002

title: Analysis of Nether Portal Spatial Compression
institution: Binodian Institute for Astronomical and Space Research
abstract: An empirical study of the spatial compression ratio observed across Nether portal transits, proposing a measurement protocol for consistent cross-portal distance reporting.
citation: Vantor, J. (2026). Analysis of Nether Portal Spatial Compression. BIASR Journal, 1(2). https://doi.org/10.5000/biasr.2026.003

title: Astronomical Survey of the End Dimension
institution: Binodian Institute for Astronomical and Space Research
abstract: The first systematic astronomical survey of the End dimension's void-sky, cataloguing ambient light phenomena and proposing a coordinate frame for future End observation missions.
citation: Oyelaran, R., Vantor, J. (2026). Astronomical Survey of the End Dimension. BIASR Journal, 1(2). https://doi.org/10.5000/biasr.2026.004
